THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KATZ, LESLIE R. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PRUDENTIAL CALIFORNIA REALTY SPEARS, STEVEN COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF HAD A DUTY TO PROTECT HERSELF BY CONDUCTING AN INSPECTION WHICH WOULD HAVE DISCOVERED THE LENGHT OF THE GARAGE.
